chapter: Chapter 1 – The Rise of Nationalism in Europe

questions.question: What is nationalism?
questions.answer: Nationalism is a feeling of love, loyalty, and devotion towards one's nation.

questions.question: In which country did the French Revolution begin?
questions.answer: The French Revolution began in France.

questions.question: In which year did the French Revolution start?
questions.answer: The French Revolution started in 1789.

questions.question: Who was Napoleon Bonaparte?
questions.answer: Napoleon Bonaparte was the ruler of France and a military leader.

questions.question: What was the Napoleonic Code?
questions.answer: The Napoleonic Code was a set of civil laws introduced by Napoleon in 1804.

questions.question: What does liberalism stand for?
questions.answer: Liberalism stands for freedom and equality before the law.

questions.question: Which country was divided into many states before unification?
questions.answer: Germany was divided into many states before unification.

questions.question: Who unified Germany?
questions.answer: Germany was unified by Otto von Bismarck.

questions.question: In which year was Germany unified?
questions.answer: Germany was unified in 1871.

questions.question: Who was Giuseppe Mazzini?
questions.answer: Giuseppe Mazzini was an Italian nationalist and revolutionary leader.

questions.question: Which country was unified by Garibaldi?
questions.answer: Garibaldi helped in the unification of Italy.

questions.question: What was the Zollverein?
questions.answer: The Zollverein was a customs union of German states.

questions.question: Which meeting was held in 1815 to redraw the map of Europe?
questions.answer: The Congress of Vienna was held in 1815.

questions.question: Who was the Austrian Chancellor at the Congress of Vienna?
questions.answer: Metternich was the Austrian Chancellor.

questions.question: What was the aim of the Congress of Vienna?
questions.answer: The aim was to restore monarchies and maintain balance of power in Europe.

questions.question: What was Romanticism?
questions.answer: Romanticism was a cultural movement that promoted national feelings and emotions.

questions.question: Who was proclaimed German Emperor in 1871?
questions.answer: Kaiser Wilhelm I was proclaimed German Emperor.

questions.question: Which revolution took place in Europe in 1848?
questions.answer: The Liberal Revolution took place in 1848.

questions.question: What was the Frankfurt Parliament?
questions.answer: The Frankfurt Parliament was a meeting of German representatives in 1848 to discuss unification.

questions.question: Which country gained independence in 1832 after a nationalist struggle?
questions.answer: Greece gained independence in 1832.

questions.question: Who was the ruler of France during the unification of Germany?
questions.answer: Napoleon III was the ruler of France.

questions.question: What does suffrage mean?
questions.answer: Suffrage means the right to vote.

questions.question: Which dynasty ruled Austria?
questions.answer: The Habsburg dynasty ruled Austria.

questions.question: Which class led the nationalist movements in Europe?
questions.answer: The middle class led the nationalist movements.

questions.question: Name one symbol of the French nation.
questions.answer: The tricolour flag is a symbol of the French nation.
